title: Korak 8

challengeFiles.name: main

tests.text: You should not have print(movie1) in your code.
You should have a try block with movie1 = Movie('The Matrix', 1999, 'The Wachowskis', 136) inside it.
You should have an except clause that catches ValueError as e.
You should use an f-string to print Validation Error: followed by a space and the error message within the except block.

description:
Sada obrišite vašu liniju print(movie1). Zatim, stavite svoju dodelu movie1 u blok try i kreirajte klauzulu except koja hvata ValueError as e i koristi f-string da ispiše Validation Error: praćen razmakom i porukom o grešci.

Slobodno promenite argumente prosleđene za instanciranje movie1 da biste videli različite poruke o grešci.
